chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1226 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.11.2025. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = For the reasons to be recorded, the applicants Ghulam Rasool s/o Khair Muhammad and Dad Muhammad s/o Faqeer Muhammad are granted post arrest bail in Crime No.44/2025 registered at P.S Bola Khan u/s 8 SPPMSS and use of Gutka and Mainpuris Act, 2019, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac) each and P.R Bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE Tufail
